title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!
